name: Abjuration
description: Protective magic that blocks, banishes, or negates threats.

name: Conjuration
description: Magic that produces objects or creatures from elsewhere, or transports them.

name: Divination
description: Magic that reveals information, perceives the distant or hidden, and foretells the future.

name: Enchantment
description: Magic that affects the minds of others, influencing or controlling them.

name: Evocation
description: Magic that harnesses raw elemental energy to deal damage or produce powerful effects.

name: Illusion
description: Magic that deceives the senses or minds of others.

name: Necromancy
description: Magic that manipulates life, death, and undeath.

name: Transmutation
description: Magic that changes the properties of creatures, objects, or the environment.
